commanded_lines: Model phrasing: GPT-5.x detected from the system harness; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4.

Action envelope: read current Lite and DKR-2 evidence; write only workers/dkr-4 artifacts; use in-memory queue and timer adapters; no product, test, doc, manifest, git, PR, frame, tree, external, start, spawn, pool, WorkerRegistry, shared scope, hidden timer, hidden queue effect, or wall changes; permission owner is the user and runtime.

Anti-goal coverage: scope_seam_escape_count -> readable; undeclared_effect_edge_count -> readable; cross_session_leak_count -> readable; unapproved_external_write_count -> readable; primitive_proof_gap_count -> readable; single_llm_truth_acceptance_count -> reducing-DKR validator-dkr-4; ungoverned_write_or_read_count -> readable; anti_goal_bypass_or_dishonesty_count -> reducing-DKR validator-dkr-4; anti_goal_coverage_gap_count == 0.

CKR-level discovery/delivery balance: DKR-4 proves the bounded queue composition and effect boundary; delivery becomes issue queue port, watch, and test PKRs only after independent checkpoint acceptance.

progress signals: queue cases 8 of 8, explicit ports 5 of 5, activation execs 13 for 13 handler starts, max concurrency 2, hidden effects 0, pool added behavior 0, checkpoint fields 20 of 20, walls 8 of 8, hashes 8 of 8, product files changed false.

active anti-goals: scope_seam_escape_count because all adapters must substitute through createScope; undeclared_effect_edge_count because queue and timer effects need declared ports; cross_session_leak_count because two sessions share one Scope; unapproved_external_write_count because real services are forbidden; primitive_proof_gap_count because start, spawn, pool, and new Lite primitives need proof; single_llm_truth_acceptance_count because validation is pending; ungoverned_write_or_read_count because evidence must stay scoped; anti_goal_bypass_or_dishonesty_count because DKR-2 cannot be assumed accepted.

Storage integrity: append-only records are the source of truth, status and progress files are generated views, and claims are accepted only on independent deterministic evidence, not one LLM's say-so.
Worker progress: .okra/runs/issue-triage-session-20260715/workers/dkr-4/progress.jsonl, written at worker finish.
Heartbeat cadence and next_check_at: ten minutes; next check is 2026-07-15T05:24:59Z.
Introspection cadence: checkpoint acceptance, any flag, level descent before plan to task, terminalization, and every third check-in.
Standing walls: all eight active walls remain standing and retire only through human context retirement.
payload.decision: candidate only; controller(flow) plus ordinary awaited promises is sufficient for bounded queue composition, and this worker does not accept or promote the result
payload.dkr_2_dependency: not assumed accepted; only forced ExecutionContext close remains conditional on later DKR-2 acceptance
role_grammar: Candidate CKRs and candidate PKRs are not promoted until the orchestrator accepts the supporting DKR learning checkpoint.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
In-progress worker narrative is not evidence; only worker progress, check-ins, metric reads, flags, or accepted checkpoints can influence the next dispatch.
